channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 21 May: Harare overcast · high 21° / low 10°
item.description: Harare: high 21°, low 10° (overcast) · Bulawayo: high 18°, low 10° (overcast) · Mutare: high 21°, low 10° (light drizzle) · Gweru: high 19°, low 10° (overcast) · Masvingo: high 19°, low 11° (light drizzle) · Victoria Falls: high 26°, low 16° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Mwana asingachemi anofira mumbereko. (A child who does not cry dies on its mother’s back.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
